mnemonics: DATA is the Machine's DIET: Data, Information, Decisions, Evaluation, Transformation
keyPoints: Data is the fundamental raw material for any ML process.
Understanding the type (structured, unstructured) and quality of data is crucial.
Data must be cleaned and pre-processed before being used for training a model.
commonMistakes: Assuming more data is always better, without considering its quality or relevance.
Not performing adequate exploratory data analysis (EDA) before building models.
Using test data during the training or pre-processing phase, leading to data leakage.
